result.stdout:
Deploy-f cli v0.5.0

USAGE
  deployf [options]
  deployf [command] [...]

OPTIONS
  -h|--help         Shows help text. 
  --version         Shows version information. 

COMMANDS
  set               set config to local or global config file 
  info              show configuration info 
  exec              exec command in the app container 
  auth              store token into global user config ~/.df/conf.ini 
  logs              get lines of logs of application 
  restart           restart the application 
  upload            upload file to the container 
  upload-folder     upload folder to the container 
  apps              list existing apps 

You can run `deployf [command] --help` to show help on a specific command.

result.stdout:
Deploy-f cli v0.5.0

USAGE
  deployf apps --token <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  list existing apps

OPTIONS
* --token           set auth token Environment variable: TOKEN. 
  --api-url         set the url to api Environment variable: API_URL. Default: "https://v2.d-f.pw".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Deploy-f cli v0.5.0

USAGE
  deployf exec <command> --app-id <value> --token <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  exec command in the app container

PARAMETERS
* command           

OPTIONS
* --app-id          set application id Environment variable: APP_ID. 
* --token           set auth token Environment variable: TOKEN. 
  --api-url         set the url to api Environment variable: API_URL. Default: "https://v2.d-f.pw".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

Deploy-f cli v0.5.0

USAGE
  deployf logs --app-id <value> --token <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  get lines of logs of application

OPTIONS
* --app-id          set application id Environment variable: APP_ID. 
* --token           set auth token Environment variable: TOKEN. 
  --tail            how many lines to fetch Default: "800".
  --api-url         set the url to api Environment variable: API_URL. Default: "https://v2.d-f.pw".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.

result.stdout:
Deploy-f cli v0.5.0

USAGE
  deployf set <param> <value> [options]

DESCRIPTION
  set config to local or global config file

PARAMETERS
* param             the parameter name Choices: "AppId", "ApiUrl", "Token". 
  value             the new value Default: "".

OPTIONS
  --clear           clear the parameter Default: "False".
  --target          Local or Global config file Choices: "Local", "Global". Default: "Local".
  -h|--help         Shows help text.
